hyperedges.label: Overleaf MCP Module Layer Stack (server → tools → git_ops → config, latex)
acquire_project() Two-Phase Pipeline: RW Lock + TTL Cache + Stale Fallback + ToolContext
CI Quality Gate: Ruff lint + mypy + bandit + pytest matrix

nodes.name: __init__.py overview
nodes.description: Overleaf MCP Server - Full CRUD operations for Overleaf projects.

nodes.name: __version__
nodes.description: Version string of overleaf_mcp.

nodes.name: latex.py overview
nodes.description: Lightweight LaTeX section parsing. Pure-function string utilities for locating \section{...}-style macros and slicing a document into section bodies.

nodes.name: SECTION_PATTERN
nodes.description: Regex pattern to match \part, \chapter, \section, \subsection, \subsubsection, \paragraph, \subparagraph.

nodes.name: parse_sections
nodes.description: Parse LaTeX content and return the sections it contains.

nodes.name: get_section_by_title
nodes.description: Return the full content of a section matched by case-insensitive title.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md overview
nodes.description: Changelog for the overleaf_mcp project, tracking version changes like 1.1.0 and 1.0.0.

nodes.name: graphify_uncached.txt overview
nodes.description: List of uncached files for graphify processing.

nodes.name: README.md overview
nodes.description: Overleaf MCP Server documentation, features, installation, configuration, and usage guide.

nodes.name: ARCHITECTURE.md overview
nodes.description: Architecture documentation for Overleaf MCP Server detailing module layers, request lifecycle, locking, caching, and timeouts.

nodes.name: API.md Rationale
nodes.description: Complete per-tool reference for 15 MCP tools grouped into CRUD categories.

nodes.name: create_project
nodes.description: Create a new Overleaf project from LaTeX content or a base64-zipped archive.

nodes.name: create_file
nodes.description: Add a new file to an existing project.

nodes.name: list_projects
nodes.description: List projects configured in overleaf_config.json.

nodes.name: list_files
nodes.description: List all non-dotfile paths in the project.

nodes.name: read_file
nodes.description: Read a text file.

nodes.name: get_sections
nodes.description: Parse a LaTeX file and list its sections.

nodes.name: get_section_content
nodes.description: Return the full body of a section matched by its title.

nodes.name: list_history
nodes.description: Show git commit history.

nodes.name: get_diff
nodes.description: Compare two refs / working tree.

nodes.name: status_summary
nodes.description: One-call project orientation.

nodes.name: edit_file
nodes.description: Replace an exact string match.

nodes.name: rewrite_file
nodes.description: Replace the entire file.

nodes.name: update_section
nodes.description: Replace the body of a LaTeX section by its title.

nodes.name: sync_project
nodes.description: Explicit force-pull.

nodes.name: delete_file
nodes.description: Delete a path and commit the removal.

nodes.name: DEVELOPMENT.md Rationale
nodes.description: Guide for local development of the server.

nodes.name: Module Boundaries
nodes.description: Strict layering: server.py -> tools.py -> git_ops.py -> config.py

nodes.name: MCPB Bundle
nodes.description: Single-file archive format for Claude Desktop built via mcpb/build-mcpb.sh.

nodes.name: index.rst Rationale
nodes.description: Main index for Overleaf MCP Sphinx documentation.

nodes.name: client_setup.rst Rationale
nodes.description: Setup instructions for various MCP clients like Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and VS Code.

nodes.name: configuration.rst Rationale
nodes.description: Documentation for Overleaf credentials precedence and config file format.

nodes.name: FastMCP
nodes.description: Transport layer framework class.
